source.name: section 3

rubrics.title: Sketch Loads and Plays Music
rubrics.description: The sketch successfully loads an MP3 file and includes a functional button that starts and stops the sound playback.

rubrics.title: Sound Analysis Implementation
rubrics.description: The sketch properly analyzes the amplitude of various frequencies in the music using appropriate p5.js sound analysis functions (like FFT).

rubrics.title: Visual Reactivity to Music
rubrics.description: The visualization clearly responds to the music, with visual elements (shapes, lines, colors) that change in direct response to the analyzed sound data.

rubrics.title: Creative Visual Design
rubrics.description: The visualization demonstrates creativity and thoughtful design choices in how the music is represented visually, going beyond basic implementations.

rubrics.title: Code Quality and Organization
rubrics.description: The code is well-organized, properly commented, and follows good programming practices, making it easy to understand how the visualization works.
